claim: N8N is best for integration-heavy internal tools, proofs of concept, and team collaboration across skill levels; Python is best for production apps requiring speed/control
actionable: Use N8N for rapid prototyping and internal automation; migrate to Python when moving to production or hitting performance limits
source_title: Should I Build My AI Agents with n8n or Python?

claim: N8N has licensing restrictions for commercialization even if open-source; Python/code has no licensing concerns if using open-source frameworks
actionable: If building commercial AI agents, use Python/code-based frameworks to avoid N8N licensing fees; only use N8N for internal tools
source_title: Should I Build My AI Agents with n8n or Python?

claim: N8N cannot handle files larger than 200MB; Python can handle hundreds of gigabytes with proper memory management
actionable: For RAG pipelines processing large PDFs or datasets, use Python; N8N chokes on files over 20MB in practice
source_title: Should I Build My AI Agents with n8n or Python?

claim: N8N JSON workflow diffs are opaque; code with Git provides clear version control and easy rollbacks that N8N cannot match
actionable: For mission-critical agents, use Python/code for clear Git history; N8N workflows are hard to track, review, and revert
source_title: Should I Build My AI Agents with n8n or Python?

claim: Python enables parallel execution, token streaming, and access to top open-source libraries (graffiti, docling, crawl4ai) that N8N integration boxes cannot
actionable: Use Python for agents needing true parallel task execution, real-time streaming responses, or cutting-edge open-source AI tools
source_title: Should I Build My AI Agents with n8n or Python?

claim: Hybrid approach: use N8N for orchestration and integrations, offload heavy processing (agents, RAG chunking, large file handling) to Python microservices
actionable: Deploy N8N and Python services together: N8N manages workflows/integration orchestration, Python handles compute-intensive agent logic
source_title: Should I Build My AI Agents with n8n or Python?
